name: Stylized dw RP
description:
Don't forget to check.Updates in the comments.

Right now. Not every character It's stylized. Probably won't be finished by the first release. Plus this Is kind of a AU so expect Differences, the actual lore. Especially characters like Cocoa I think I went to Far stylizing her. 😭 Some characters are not stylized and are just shorter versions of the actual characters. Right now, I'm planning To add the Mains. Caretakers, some of them are fan-made. Some of them are official. But not everything's gonna be here. First release. Because I'm not a big Dandy's World Fan. And plus, there's Original characters in here like this Universes version of lola and brea!
